title: polypodium schroderi
intro: Polypodium schroderi, also known as the Cat's Claw fern, is a type of fern native to the subtropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the rhizomes of this plant have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Polypodium schroderi include its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as digestive issues, arthritis, and even certain types of cancer, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Polypodium schroderi is often used in the form of teas, tinctures, or capsules, and is also sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
